heading: Time for making reports
label: 437 Time for making reports
notes: Amendments1965—Subsec. (b). inserted reference to in two places.Pub. L. 89–216section 441 of this title
amendments: Amendments1965—Subsec. (b). inserted reference to in two places.Pub. L. 89–216section 441 of this title

children.label: a
children.text: Each labor organization shall file the initial report required under within ninety days after the date on which it first becomes subject to this chapter.section 431(a) of this title

children.label: b
children.text: Each person required to file a report under section 431(b), 432, 433(a), the second sentence of 433(b), or shall file such report within ninety days after the end of each of its fiscal years; except that where such person is subject to section 431(b), 432, 433(a), the second sentence of 433(b), or , as the case may be, for only a portion of such a fiscal year (because , occurs during such person’s fiscal year) such person becomes subject to this chapter during its fiscal year or such person may consider that portion as the entire fiscal year in making such report.section 441 of this titlesection 441 of this titleSeptember 14, 1959
